title: blechnum deltoides
intro: Blechnum deltoides, also known as the delta-blechnum or mangrove fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Blechnaceae. It is a tropical and subtropical plant native to Australia, Asia, and parts of Africa. Blechnum deltoides has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and promoting digestive health.
